text.title: BA Trends Summary Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 the produced artefact must satisfy. Validator (scripts/validate-ba-trends-summary.py) enforces required keys + per-field constraints. Forbidden patterns are explicit anti-shapes the validator rejects.

example.note: quarter pattern violated; trends empty (min 3); next_review missing.

forbidden.pattern: Summary lists trends but no adoption decision per trend.
Trends are listed without source URLs or publication dates.
